a_image.alt: Page Transition Effects style mood board — Heavy Motion · Page FX

sections.a_eyebrow: Animation · Heavy Motion · Engaging · Modern · Professional
sections.a_description: Smooth cross-fades between views, sliding page transitions, and the app-like polish of sites where navigation feels like switching screens in a native application — Page Transition Effects design bridges the gap between websites and apps. The clean backgrounds and professional typography provide visual stability, while the transitions themselves create a seamless, unbroken flow that makes multi-page sites feel like single-page applications.

This transition-focused style powers SPA-style marketing sites, design agency portfolios with seamless project-to-project navigation, and web applications using the View Transitions API. You'll see it on portfolio sites where clicking a thumbnail morphs into a full case study, e-commerce stores with smooth product-to-detail transitions, and dashboard applications where switching between views feels as fluid as swiping between mobile app screens.

a_image_cover.alt: Page Transition Effects style use case illustration
Page Transition Effects style use case illustration
Page Transition Effects style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The polished, app-like aesthetic of page-transition websites — smooth cross-fades, slide-overs, and morph transitions between views that make multi-page sites feel like native applications. Background: clean white (#ffffff) with a crisp, modern app-like feel. The .inner panel has a very light gray background (#f8f9fa) with a 1px border (#dee2e6) and 10px border-radius — a content container that slides, fades, or morphs between states. Colors: deep blue (#2563eb) as the primary accent — professional, trustworthy, and associated with polished web applications. Near-black (#212529) for headings, medium gray (#6c757d) for body text. The aesthetic is app-like — page changes feel like view transitions in a native application rather than traditional web navigation. Set in General Sans — a modern grotesque with clean proportions, embodying the polished app-like quality. Heading at weight 600, 26px, line-height 1.3, letter-spacing -0.3px, color #212529. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #2563eb. Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7, color #6c757d. Buttons: primary — deep blue (#2563eb), white text, 8px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, blue border. Alternatives: Switzer (modern grotesque), DM Sans (geometric neutral).
